header.name: Oskar Ortiz
header.summary: Software Engineering student with a practical focus on full-stack development, modern user interfaces, and cloud/serverless architecture. Builds web solutions with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS services, applying modular architecture, performance optimization, and product thinking to deliver maintainable digital experiences.

projectExperience.title: Cuyitech Pro
projectExperience.subtitle: Technical agricultural management application
bullets: Developed a modular and scalable application focused on technical agricultural management for guinea pig production environments.
Implemented an alert system to support health monitoring workflows and improve operational response times.
Structured technical risk analysis features to support productive decision-making with digital tools.
Applied maintainable frontend architecture patterns to improve feature growth and long-term usability.

projectExperience.title: 3D Educational System
projectExperience.subtitle: Interactive educational visualization platform
bullets: Built an interactive educational application using Three.js and Vite to deliver 3D visualization experiences.
Applied ISO/IEC 25010 quality principles to guide software quality decisions across usability, performance, and maintainability.
Optimized graphical performance and scene rendering to improve stability and user experience in browser environments.

projectExperience.title: Cloud Architecture
projectExperience.subtitle: Serverless infrastructure implementation
bullets: Designed serverless infrastructure using AWS Lambda and API Gateway to create scalable, low-maintenance web services.
Focused on efficient cloud execution models suitable for modern web applications and API-driven workflows.
Strengthened practical knowledge of distributed architecture, event-driven services, and deployment efficiency.

education.title: Software Engineering
education.subtitle: Undergraduate studies in progress
education.description: Academic training focused on software development, architecture, problem solving, and modern engineering practices.

certifications: Continuous training in React, Next.js, and modern frontend development patterns.
Applied learning in serverless cloud architecture with AWS Lambda and API Gateway.
Ongoing study of software quality standards, including ISO/IEC 25010, for practical project evaluation.
